description: Google Cloud Web Risk is a web threat intelligence service that helps applications detect unsafe URLs such as malware, phishing, and unwanted software. It provides APIs for URL lookups, local threat-list updates, submissions, and related threat evaluation workflows.
summary: webrisk.googleapis.com exposes one authenticated HTTP API for Google Cloud Web Risk URL lookup, threat-list diff/update, URI submission, and related operations; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found on this domain.
